passive.name: Get Excited!
passive.description: Jinx receives massively increased Move Speed and Attack Speed whenever she helps kill or destroy an enemy champions epic jungle monster, or structure.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Whenever {{ci|Jinx}} scores a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy {{tip|champion}}, epic {{tip|monster}}, {{tip|turret}}, or inhibitor shortly after damaging them, she gains a burst of {{sti|ms|{{as|movement speed}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: During this time, she also gains {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and is allowed to exceed the attack speed cap.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Whenever '''Jinx''' scores a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy {{tip|champion}}, epic {{tip|monster}}, {{tip|turret}}, or [[inhibitor]] within 3 seconds of damaging them, she gains {{sti|ms|{{as|175% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} decaying over 6 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: Additionally, she is allowed to exceed the {{tt|attack speed cap|normally 2.5 attacks per second}} and gains a [[stack]] of ''Get Excited!'' for the same duration, stacking up to 5 times. Only {{tip|takedown|takedowns}} against enemy {{tip|champion|champions}} can grant stacks beyond the first.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Get Excited!:}} For each stack, '''Jinx''' gains {{sti|{{as|25% '''total''' attack speed}}}}, up to a maximum of {{as|{{ap|25*5}}%|as}}.

Q.name: Switcheroo!
Q.description: Jinx modifies her basic attacks by swapping between Pow-Pow, her minigun and Fishbones, her rocket launcher. Attacks with Pow-Pow grant Attack Speed, while attacks with Fishbones deal area of effect damage, gain increased range, but drain Mana and attack slower.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Toggle:}} {{ci|Jinx}} switches between Pow-Pow, her minigun, and Fishbones, her rocket launcher.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|{{cci|Pow-Pow.png|Jinx#Pow-Pow|Pow-Pow}}:}} Basic attacks with '''Pow-Pow''' generate stacks of [[File:Jinx Rev'd up.png|20px]] ''Rev'd up'' for a short time. Stacks expire one at a time.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|{{cci|Fishbones.png|Jinx#Fishbones|Fishbones}}:}} Basic attacks with '''Fishbones''' {{sti|mana|{{as|cost mana}}}} to deal {{as|increased physical damage}} to the primary target as well as surrounding enemies. While using '''Fishbones''', ''Jinx'' gains {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}} but loses a portion of her {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Rev'd up:}} For each stack, '''Jinx''' gains {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}, with the first stack being twice as potent. Only the first attack after switching to '''Fishbones''' will benefit from ''Rev'd up''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Toggle:}} '''Jinx''' switches between ''{{cci|Pow-Pow.png|Jinx#Pow-Pow|Pow-Pow}}'', her minigun, and ''{{cci|Fishbones.png|Jinx#Fishbones|Fishbones}}'', her rocket launcher.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Pow-Pow:}} Basic attacks with ''Pow-Pow'' generate a [[stack]] of [[File:Jinx Rev'd up.png|20px]] ''Rev'd up'' for {{fd|2.5}} seconds, refreshing on subsequent attacks with ''Pow-Pow'' and stacking up to 3 times. Each stack of ''Rev'd up'' grants {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}, with all stacks beyond the first one being 50% effective. Stacks expire by one when the duration ends.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Bonus Attack Speed|{{ap|30/2 to 130/2}}%|Attack Speed per Subsequent Stack|{{ap|30/4 to 130/4}}%|Maximum Attack Speed|{{ap|30 to 130}}%}}
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Fishbones:}} Basic attacks with ''Fishbones'' cost {{sti|{{as|mana}}}} {{tip|on-attack}} to deal {{as|110% AD}} {{as|'''modified''' physical damage}} to the target and nearby enemies. The damage is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers. While ''Fishbones'' is equipped, '''Jinx''' gains {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}} but loses {{sti|{{as|10% of her '''bonus''' attack speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Only the first attack after switching to [[File:Switcheroo!.png|20px|link=]] Fishbones will benefit from [[File:Jinx Rev'd up.png|20px]] Rev'd up''.
wiki_detail.notes:
* Toggle abilities do not count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
* '''Jinx's''' first attack after switching to {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} can be triggered after {{fd|0.4}} seconds, instead of using the attack timer.
* Despite '''Jinx''' starting the game using {{ai|Pow-Pow|Jinx|''Pow-Pow''}} she doesn't receive any bonus attack speed until ''Switcheroo!'' has been learned.
* {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} splash damage affects structures (minions will target '''Jinx''') but does not affect targets if '''Jinx's''' attacks are {{tip|block|blocked}}, {{tip|dodge|dodged}}, or {{tip|blind|missed}}.
* With {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}} {{ai|Pow-Pow|Jinx|''Pow-Pow''}} generates one stack per enemy hit.
* Each of {{iis|Runaan's Hurricane}} additional bolts apply {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|Fishbones'}} splash damage, which stacks with each other.
* Both weapons deal {{tip|basic damage}} to their primary target (this includes the increased damage of {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}}), which applies {{sti|life steal}} based on the damage dealt (post-mitigation) as usual.
* The splash damage of {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} is based on the pre-mitigation damage done to the primary target (which includes critical strikes), and is not considered {{as|'''modified''' physical damage}}. It deals {{tip|default damage}}: It doesn't apply {{sti|life steal}} or [[on-hit effect]]s.
** {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} damage: {{as|{{#expr:100+10}}% AD}} (100% + 10%).
** {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} critical strike damage: {{as|{{fd|{{#expr:(100+10)*1.75}}}}% AD}} ((100% + 10%){{times}}{{fd|1.75}}).
** {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} critical strike damage with {{ii|Infinity Edge}}: {{as|{{fd|{{#expr:(100+10)*2.15}}}}% AD}} ((100% + 10%){{times}}{{fd|2.15}}).
** {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane|bolt}} damage: {{as|{{#expr:(100+10)*0.4}}% AD}} ((100% + 10%){{times}}{{ii|Runaan's Hurricane|{{fd|0.4}}}}).
** {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane|bolt}} critical strike damage: {{as|{{fd|{{#expr:(100+10)*0.4*1.75}}}}% AD}} ((100% + 10%){{times}}{{ii|Runaan's Hurricane|{{fd|0.4}}}}{{times}}{{fd|1.75}}).
** {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane|bolt}} critical strike damage with {{ii|Infinity Edge}}: {{as|{{fd|{{#expr:(100+10)*0.4*1.25}}}}% AD}} ((100% + 10%){{times}}{{ii|Runaan's Hurricane|{{fd|0.4}}}}{{times}}{{fd|2.15}}).
** {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} potential damage on stacked enemies with {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}}: {{as|{{fd|{{#expr:(100+10)+(100+10)*0.4*2}}}}% AD}} (110% + 44% + 44%).
** {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} potential critical strike damage on stacked enemies with {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}}: {{as|{{fd|{{#expr:((100+10)+(100+10)*0.4*2)*1.75}}}}% AD}} ((110% + 44% + 44%){{times}}{{fd|1.75}}).
** {{ai|Fishbones|Jinx|''Fishbones''}} potential critical strike damage on stacked enemies with {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}} and {{ii|Infinity Edge}}: {{as|{{fd|{{#expr:((100+10)+(100+10)*0.4*2)*2.15}}}}% AD}} ((110% + 44% + 44%){{times}}{{fd|2.15}}).

W.name: Zap!
W.description: Jinx uses Zapper, her shock pistol, to fire a blast that deals damage to the first enemy hit, slowing and revealing it.
W.tooltip: Jinx fires a shock blast that deals {{ totaldamage }} physical damage to the first enemy hit, Slows them by {{ slowpercent }}%, and reveals them for {{ slowduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Jinx}} fires a shock bolt in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy hit, {{tip|slow|slowing}} and {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} them for a short time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Jinx''' fires a shock blast in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to the first enemy it hits and {{tip|standard sight|reveals}} and {{tip|slow|slows}} them for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.cast time: {{pp|0.6 to 0.4 for 11|0 to 250|key1=%|type='''bonus''' attack speed|color=attack speed}}

E.name: Flame Chompers!
E.description: Jinx throws out a line of snare grenades that explode after 5 seconds, lighting enemies on fire. Flame Chompers will bite enemy champions who walk over them, rooting them in place.
E.tooltip: Jinx tosses out 3 chompers that last for {{ grenadeduration }} seconds. They explode on contact with enemy champions, Rooting them for {{ rootduration }} seconds and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to nearby enemies.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Jinx}} tosses a line of ''Chompers'' at the target location that explode after a few seconds, dealing {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If an enemy champion steps on a ''Chomper'', it will explode, {{tip|knockdown|knock them down}}, and briefly {{tip|root}} them.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Jinx''' tosses out 3 ''Chompers'' centered at the target location, landing after {{fd|0.4}} seconds, arming after {{fd|0.75}} seconds, and exploding after 5 seconds to deal {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.description2: Each ''Chomper'' explodes on contact with an enemy {{tip|champion|champion}}, {{tip|knockdown|knocking them down}} and {{tip|root|rooting}} them for {{fd|1.5}} seconds. Enemy champions can be affected by only one ''Chomper''.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Flame Chompers! will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Chompers'' will halt when encountering {{ai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}} and {{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}}.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} does not negate the explosion.

R.name: Super Mega Death Rocket!
R.description: Jinx fires a super rocket across the map that gains damage as it travels. The rocket will explode upon colliding with an enemy champion, dealing damage to it and surrounding enemies based on their missing Health.
R.tooltip:
Jinx fires a rocket that explodes on the first enemy champion hit, dealing {{ damagefloor }} to {{ damagemax }} + {{ percentdamage }}% missing Health physical damage, gaining damage over the first second of travel time. Nearby enemies take {{ aoedamagemult*100 }}% Damage.

Missing Health damage cannot exceed {{ monsterexecutemax }} against Monsters.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Jinx}} fires a rocket in the target direction that explodes upon the first enemy champion hit, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to the target and surrounding enemies.
wiki_detail.blur2: The damage is increased based on travel time and each {{as|target's missing health}}. Surrounding enemies take reduced damage.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Jinx''' fires a massive rocket in the target direction, briefly granting {{tip|sight}} of its {{tt|surroundings|Cannot grant sight into brush nor through terrain}} and exploding upon colliding with an enemy champion. The explosion deals {{as|physical damage}} to {{tt|nearby|centered on the initial target}} enemies and grants {{tip|sight}} of the {{tt|area|Can grant sight into brush and through terrain}} for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Super Mega Death Rocket!'' deals {{pp|type=distance traveled|key=%|10 to 100 for 16|0 to 1500}} damage. This does not affect the '''bonus''' damage based on the {{as|target's '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Maximum Physical Damage|{{ap|325 to 625}} {{as|(+ 165% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25 to 35}}% of target's '''missing''' health)}}|Minimum Physical Damage|{{ap|(325 to 625)*0.1}} {{as|(+ {{ap|165*0.1}}% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25 to 35}}% of target's '''missing''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: Enemies surrounding the primary target take 80% damage. The '''bonus''' damage based on the {{as|target's '''missing''' health}} is capped at 1200 against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Maximum Secondary Damage|{{ap|(325 to 625)*0.8}} {{as|(+ {{ap|165*0.8}}% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|(25 to 35)*0.8}}% of target's '''missing''' health)}}|Minimum Secondary Damage|{{ap|(325 to 625)*0.8*0.1}} {{as|(+ {{ap|165*0.8*0.1}}% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|(25 to 35)*0.8}}% of target's '''missing''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|400|radius of explosion}} / {{tip|sight|icononly = true}} {{tt|1000|sight radius of missile}} / {{tt|1000|radius of reveal from explosion}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will not prevent the explosion.
* ''Super Mega Death Rocket's'' projectile has an [[File:Super Mega Death Rocket! Minimap.png|40px|link=]] icon on the mini-map while it is in flight. It can be seen by only '''Jinx''' and her allies.
* The bonus damage based on missing health is based on each unit's own missing health and not the primary target's.
* Unlike similar spells, ''Super Mega Death Rocket'' will not increase it's damage when ranked up while the missile is in flight.{{bug|2}}
** This is because the base damage is fixed at a multiple of the damage the rocket initially started with.
** The {{as|'''bonus''' AD}} ratio will still update when {{as|AD}} is gained or lost between the cast and hit of the missile.
{{Effect at cast time start}}
wiki_detail.tips: * The maximum damage is reached after traveling 1500 units, which is equal to roughly {{fd|0.85}} seconds of travel time. The rocket changes its visual appearance and missile speed slightly earlier, after traveling 1350 units.
